SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATO, CHARLOTTE SUE AS TO DEFENDANT IT'S JUST LUNCH INTERNATIONAL LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED JUN-08-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT IT'S JUST LUNCH HOLDING LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-11-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-11-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF CHARLOTTE SUE PATO. ALSO APPEARING WAS MANDY WATSON, VICE PRESIDENT OF OPERATIONS FOR IT'S JUST LUNCH SAN FRANCISCO, LLC, WHICH TO DATE HAS NOT BEEN NAMED A PARTY TO THIS ACTION. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE AS TO DEFENDANTS IT'S JUST LUNCH HOLDING, LLC & IT'S JUST LUNCH INTERNATIONAL, LLC. PLAINTIFF WAS UNABLE TO PROPERLY EFFECTUATE SERVICE OF HER CLAIM ON DEFENDANT SARAH TATMAN. REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL AS TO DEFENDANT SARAH TATMAN, ONLY FILED WITH THE COURT. PURSUANT TO THE AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES, IT'S JUST LUNCH SAN FRANCISCO, LLC SHALL BE ADDED TO PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AS A NAMED DEFENDANT. MS. WATSON WAIVED SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM ON NEWLY NAMED DEFENDANT IT'S JUST LUNCH SAN FRANCISCO, LLC AT TODAY'S HEARING. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETURNED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY PATO, CHARLOTTE SUE AS TO DEFENDANT IT'S JUST LUNCH HOLDING LLC IT'S JUST LUNCH INTERNATIONAL LLC TATMAN, SARAH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-14-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATO, CHARLOTTE SUE

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATO, CHARLOTTE SUE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT IT'S JUST LUNCH HOLDING LLC IT'S JUST LUNCH INTERNATIONAL LLC IT'S JUST LUNCH SAN FRANCISCO, LLC (IJLSF, LLC) PARTIES AGREE TO ADD IJLSF, LLC AS AN ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT WHICH WAIVES SERVICE AND NOTICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
